title: What is the soul Yeshua? am I able to even teach the shema without having a clear delineated definition of a soul? How would I translate a soul into block talk?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: What about the throat?  Why is there correlation?  What about the glory or קבוד?
body:
What about the throat? 
Why is there correlation? 
What about the glory or קבוד?
content:
What about the throat? 
Why is there correlation? 
What about the glory or קבוד?
